scripts.db:migrate:apply: docker run --rm -v "$(pwd):/data" -w /data --network cribsearch_default -e DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://cribsearch:cribsearch@postgres:5432/local_cribsearch?sslmode=disable}" arigaio/atlas:latest migrate apply --env local
scripts.db:migrate:validate: docker run --rm -v "$(pwd):/data" -w /data --network cribsearch_default arigaio/atlas:latest migrate validate --env local --dev-url "postgresql://cribsearch:cribsearch@postgres-dev:5432/local_cribsearch_dev?sslmode=disable"
scripts.db:migrate:new: docker run --rm -v "$(pwd):/data" -w /data arigaio/atlas:latest migrate new --dir file://migrations
scripts.db:migrate:hash: docker run --rm -v "$(pwd):/data" -w /data arigaio/atlas:latest migrate hash --dir file://migrations
